reason: A family isolated in a haunted hotel feels the walls close in with mounting dread.
A submarine crew trapped underwater in a nuclear crisis—claustrophobic tension nonstop.
Imprisoned on a brutal planet, Ripley confronts horrors in tight corridors.
An FBI trainee in a celluloid-light cage, the hunt for Buffalo Bill tightens the noose.
A future prison of sanity warps time as one man races against a virus outbreak.
POWs struggle in a POW camp’s tight grids, every corridor a promise of doom.
A dropship lures you into an alien hive—tight spaces, relentless dread.
A lone cop battles terrorists in a trapped high-rise, every floor a trap.
